scope: Port the structured request-permissions RPC substrate and MCP approval template renderer into AgenC-owned permission code.
_sourceRootBrandingAllow: branding-scan: allow upstream source root path

requiredBehaviors: Expose structured request permission profiles with network and file-system sections.
Accept donor request-profile aliases for file-system and glob-depth field names while exposing AgenC camelCase types.
Normalize legacy read/write roots into canonical file-system entries.
Reject unknown request-profile namespaces and empty requested profiles.
edgeCases: Null network and file-system sections are treated as absent.
Glob entries can only be requested as deny-read constraints.
Relative concrete paths require a cwd before normalization.

requiredBehaviors: Default omitted grant scope to turn and omitted strict auto review to false.
Reject session-scoped strict auto review by returning an empty turn-scoped response.
Intersect client-granted permissions with the originally requested permissions before returning them.
Preserve turn-scoped strict auto review when the grant is otherwise valid.
edgeCases: Unknown client response namespaces are ignored rather than making the request fail.
Network grants survive only when both requested and granted enabled=true.
A concrete child path grant survives a requested cwd-bound project-root permission.
A broader grant than the requested concrete path is dropped.
A project-root grant cannot be accepted without the request cwd.

requiredBehaviors: Track pending request-permissions calls by call id until a client response, cancellation, or abort arrives.
Normalize resolved client responses against the request that created the pending call.
Resolve replaced or aborted requests with null and remove them from the pending map.
Expose string permission labels for the existing daemon notification surface without making them the source of truth.
edgeCases: Duplicate call ids resolve the earlier pending request with null.
Unknown responses return false and do not mutate the pending map.
abortAll resolves every pending request exactly once.

requiredBehaviors: Load template files with schema version 4.
Render exact server, connector, and tool-title matches only.
Substitute connector-name placeholders only when a non-empty connector name exists.
Render named template params first, sort remaining params by raw name, and reject duplicate display labels.
edgeCases: The safe default bundle contains no templates and renders null until callers inject AgenC-owned templates.
